name: torso_frame_head_camera_grounded_sam2_pose
description: Detect a target object in saved head-camera RGB-D and output its pose in torso_link4 coordinates.

parameters.depth_path: Saved depth NPY path in meters.
parameters.output_dir: Output directory for mask, annotated image, point cloud, and reports.
parameters.grounded_sam2_root: Grounded-SAM-2 root containing model code, weights, BERT, and GroundingDINO config.
parameters.min_valid_depth_points: Minimum valid masked depth points required for success.
parameters.save_point_cloud: Whether to save masked world point cloud.
parameters.reference_frame: MuJoCo body/site frame for local output. Defaults to torso_link4.
